name: punch-collision-state-restoration
description: Verify rubble-safe punch collision is temporary and every character part returns to normal solid collision after the action.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=6000,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local character=p.Character local root=character.HumanoidRootPart root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) root.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) local result=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') local during=root.CollisionGroup local duringAttribute=character:GetAttribute('DepthActiveCollisionGroup') task.wait(1.05) local restored=true local wrong=0 for _,part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do if part:IsA('BasePart') and part.CollisionGroup~='PlayerCharacters' then restored=false wrong+=1 end end local horizontal=Vector3.new(root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.X,0,root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Z).Magnitude return H:JSONEncode({ok=result.ok,during=during,duringAttribute=duringAttribute,after=root.CollisionGroup,afterAttribute=character:GetAttribute('DepthActiveCollisionGroup'),restored=restored,wrong=wrong,horizontal=horizontal})
